Point.title: Point
Point.description: Represents a point in a coordinate system.

z.description: The z-coordinate of the point (optional for 3D systems).

label.description: A label or name for the point.

Line.title: Line
Line.description: Represents a line segment defined by two points.

startPointId.description: Reference to the starting Point. (Relationship: Line 1:1 Point)

endPointId.description: Reference to the ending Point. (Relationship: Line 1:1 Point)

order.description: The order of the line in the loop.

bearing.description: The bearing or direction of the line.

distance.description: The length or distance of the line.

label.description: A label or name for the line.

Loop.title: Loop
Loop.description: Represents a closed loop formed by a series of lines.

name.description: A user-defined name for the loop.

lineIds.description: References to the Lines that make up the loop. (Relationship: Loop 1:N Line)

misclosure.description: The calculated misclosure for the loop.

tolerance.description: The tolerance setting for misclosure calculations.

label.description: A label or name for the loop.

userId.description: The ID of the user who submitted the comment.

userEmail.description: The email of the user who submitted the comment.

text.description: The content of the feedback comment.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the comment was created.

Derivative.title: Derivative
Derivative.description: Represents a saved result from the AI derivative calculator.

id.description: Unique identifier for the calculation record.

simplified.description: The simplified form of the derivative.

latex.description: The LaTeX representation of the derivative.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the calculation was saved.

Workspace.title: Workspace
Workspace.description: Represents a saved configuration of the interactive graph stage.

name.description: The name given to this saved workspace.

labStates.description: The full parameter state for all open labs.

definition.description: Stores created loops. This collection is now public.
Stores lines for a specific loop. Nested under a loop to ensure data integrity.

params.name: loopId
params.description: The ID of the parent loop.

definition.description: Stores user-submitted feedback. Now publicly readable and writable.

params.name: commentId
params.description: The unique ID of the comment.

definition.description: Stores results from the AI derivative calculator. Now publicly writable.

params.name: derivativeId
params.description: The unique ID of the derivative calculation.

definition.description: Stores saved configurations of the interactive graph stage.

params.name: workspaceId
params.description: The unique ID of the workspace.

firestore.reasoning: A new 'workspaces' collection has been added to allow users to persist their entire multi-lab configurations. This provides a cloud-based 'keep' mechanism that is more robust than simple PDF exports, as it allows for state reconstruction.
